data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. BIT ON MATTY wasn't far away at the finish when 5th and beaten only 4.5 lengths (18.30) at this track. Won at his only start from this draw. Can make amends. 7. VERGLAS is worth forgiving last start after finishing eighth (18.43) in a Grade 5 at this track over 300m. The form out of last race has been strong. Likely to play a prominent role. 2. PAW BELLONDA turned spotting a big start finishing seventh (18.27) last time in a Grade 5 at this track. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Should play a prominent role. 8. ROUGH PASSAGE was out of the money at this circuit last start but can atone.","runners":[1,7,2,8],"exclusive":false}
